name: get_submission_download
description: Download the generated PDF file from a completed submission. This returns the raw PDF binary content. The submission must be in 'processed' state. You can also use the download_url or permanent_download_url from the get_submission response directly. Submissions expire after a configurable period; check the 'expired' field on the submission before attempting download.

parameters.name: submission_id
parameters.description: The submission ID of the generated PDF to download.
